meta.title: Customer Reviews | AmberNord
meta.description: Real voices from Switzerland: unfiltered experiences with the AmberNord sea-buckthorn elixir after 14 days of daily use.

og.title: Customer Reviews | AmberNord
og.description: Real voices from Switzerland: unfiltered experiences with the AmberNord sea-buckthorn elixir.

intro.heading: Customer Reviews
intro.p1: Unfiltered experiences from Switzerland — after at least 14 days of daily use. Every review is verified against the order number before being published.

list.heading: All Reviews
list.empty: No reviews published yet. Be the first — share your experience below.

form.heading: Submit a Review
form.intro: Your review will appear after we verify the order number. We only publish your first name and city — your email stays private.
form.name: First name (or initials)
form.order: Order number (from your Stripe confirmation email)
form.textHint: Describe in your own words what changed after 14 days — energy, skin, sleep, digestion —, how the elixir tastes, and what surprised you.
form.textPlaceholder: Example: I've been taking AmberNord for 3 weeks every morning before breakfast. The taste was unfamiliar at first, but after 10 days I noticed more energy in the morning and calmer digestion. What convinces me: honestly declared, no additives.
form.consent: I allow AmberNord to publish my first name, city and review text on the website. My email stays private.
form.success: Thank you! Your review has been submitted. After we verify the order number, it will appear here — usually within 48 hours.
